Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='AEXP_Hyena' or defName='AEXP_Lion' or defName='AEXP_Boombat' or defName='AEXP_Tapir')]/modExtensions/li[@Class='VEF.AnimalBehaviours.ExtendedRaceProperties']

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='AEXP_Hyena' or defName='AEXP_Lion' or defName='AEXP_Boombat' or defName='AEXP_Tapir')]

Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='AEXP_Crocodile' or defName='AEXP_Jaguar' or defName='AEXP_Hedgehog' or defName='AEXP_RedPanda' or defName='AEXP_Lemur' or defName='AEXP_Anaconda' or defName='AEXP_Badger')]/modExtensions/li[@Class='VEF.AnimalBehaviours.ExtendedRaceProperties']

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName='AEXP_Crocodile' or defName='AEXP_Jaguar' or defName='AEXP_Hedgehog' or defName='AEXP_RedPanda' or defName='AEXP_Lemur' or defName='AEXP_Anaconda' or defName='AEXP_Badger')]
